sign_convention: delta_stock<0 => private FASTER; P(DQ)=P(delta_stock>+5%)=private >5% SLOWER = reproduction-FAIL side; R_systematic = 1 - delta_stock/100.

provenance.within_basis: measured n=12 fresh-server local A10G sm_86 (#159), ~0.011%
provenance.cross_basis: frantic-penguin 3 same-submission OFFICIAL a10g-small draws 489.63/483.80/480.41, CV 0.962% (#159) -- the dominant term
provenance.config_note: cross measured on the split-KV/K7 ~485 TPS frontier, NOT int4_mtp_batchinv; #478 establishes sigma_hw is a MULTIPLICATIVE clock/bandwidth draw -> the ~1% FRACTIONAL model transfers across configs (a model assumption, not a direct fire-config measurement). Absolute-TPS (3% at ~160 TPS) is the conservative loose bound.
provenance.common_mode_note: sigma_hw is hardware-allocation scatter; the #754 delta_stock common-mode noise is public-anchor PROMPT sampling -> independent sources -> quadrature, no double-count.

gate_literal_epubfixed.note: public anchor held fixed (the gate divides by the fixed official-128 public TPS); removes common-mode noise -> upper reading on p_g1.

arm_c_invert_margin.margin_definition: reported number must beat the 126.378 bar by g1_margin_tps_at_95 so the 95%-worst single private draw (R_05) still clears the bar: reported* = bar/R_05.

honesty_carry_forward.common_mode_note: the 6.05% systematic SE is dominated by the shared official-128 public-anchor sampling noise (5.32pp common-mode); the gate-literal e_pub-fixed SE is 2.88pp -> p_g1 even higher.
honesty_carry_forward.window_block_bootstrap_conservatism: the ~10s spec-log window block bootstrap is conservative vs an i.i.d.-prompt resample.

sigma_hw_provenance.within_basis: measured n=12 fresh-server local A10G sm_86 (#159), ~0.011%
sigma_hw_provenance.cross_basis: frantic-penguin 3 same-submission OFFICIAL a10g-small draws 489.63/483.80/480.41, CV 0.962% (#159) -- the dominant term
sigma_hw_provenance.config_note: cross measured on the split-KV/K7 ~485 TPS frontier, NOT int4_mtp_batchinv; #478 establishes sigma_hw is a MULTIPLICATIVE clock/bandwidth draw -> the ~1% FRACTIONAL model transfers across configs (a model assumption, not a direct fire-config measurement). Absolute-TPS (3% at ~160 TPS) is the conservative loose bound.
sigma_hw_provenance.common_mode_note: sigma_hw is hardware-allocation scatter; the #754 delta_stock common-mode noise is public-anchor PROMPT sampling -> independent sources -> quadrature, no double-count.

honesty_carry_forward.no_double_count: sigma_hw (hardware-allocation) and delta_stock common-mode (prompt sampling) are independent -> added in quadrature, not double-counted.

headline: On a single private reproduction draw, the int4_mtp_batchinv fire has P(G1-pass)=98.5%, clearing the 5% reproduction rule; the 95%-worst draw still runs at 97.7% of reported, so the official number need only beat the 126.378 bar by 2.9 TPS to clear G1 at 95% confidence.
